notes: v0.14.10 — replaced entire SHARD ship-skin family with fresh art. ASH (default, free, steel-grey arrowhead with cyan spine). AMP (free second loadout, vibrant electric cyan with starfield interior). SOLSTICE (10,000 PULSE shop, gold-and-teal split-spine exhibition chassis). PHANTOM (200 SURGE premium, translucent ghost-crystal hull). Old PRISM/CIPHER/VOID/NEXUS IDs auto-migrated to the new family on load — existing saves keep their unlock list and active selection pointed at the matching new texture. Windows only.
